_doc: Feature flags & visibility switches. All keys here are wired into runtime — flipping any of them affects behaviour on next app launch (or scene reload for lobby flags). API: ConfigManager.is_feature_enabled(key) / is_visible(key) / get_default_theme().

feature_flags._doc: Top-level on/off switches. Disable to hide entire features.

ui_visibility._doc: Per-control visibility in lobby / cards. false = hide.

theme._doc: default_theme is consumed by SaveManager._seed_first_launch_defaults — kept here as the single canonical source (init_config.default_theme mirrors it).

legal._doc: Privacy policy and Terms of Service URLs. REQUIRED by App Store (Guideline 5.1.1) and Google Play. Both URLs must be live and reachable BEFORE store submission — otherwise reviewer will reject. Used by tutor slide-1 footer (clickable links) and settings popup buttons. Open via OS.shell_open in NotificationManager-style hooks.
